JOB.aws_equivalent: Step Functions state machine or AWS Batch job definition
JOB.migration_notes: Map JOB parameters to Step Functions execution config or Batch job parameters

EXEC.aws_equivalent: Lambda invocation or ECS task in Step Functions
EXEC.migration_notes: Each EXEC step becomes a Step Functions state or Batch job step

DD.aws_equivalent: S3 bucket/key, DynamoDB table, or RDS connection
DD.migration_notes: Map DSN to S3 paths, DISP to access patterns

PROC.aws_equivalent: Step Functions nested workflow or reusable Lambda layer
PROC.migration_notes: Convert to parameterized Step Functions or shared modules

IF/THEN/ELSE.migration_notes: Map condition codes to Step Functions Choice conditions

SORT.aws_equivalent: AWS Glue ETL job, Athena query, or Lambda with sorting logic
SORT.migration_notes: Large sorts → Glue/EMR; small sorts → Lambda

IEBGENER.aws_equivalent: S3 copy (aws s3 cp) or Lambda file transfer

IDCAMS.aws_equivalent: DynamoDB table management via SDK or CloudFormation

DFSORT.aws_equivalent: AWS Glue ETL or Athena ORDER BY

IKJEFT01.aws_equivalent: Systems Manager Run Command or Lambda

DSNTEP2.aws_equivalent: Aurora Data API batch execution or Glue job
